title: Founder's Associate Intern
biggest_lever: Operator/founder-associate spike + UK-local + 'built agents with Claude Code' maps to an observability-AI tooling startup that values hands-on AI builders.
biggest_risk: INTERN/junior-band scope — at ~6.4 yrs as a first-employee 0->1 operator he reads as overqualified flight-risk; the separate FA/CoS (~$100k) Tracer posting is the better-band role but is NOT in the live board API (closed/delisted).
apply_move: Likely skip as an intern; if pursued, pitch as overqualified and ask whether the FA/CoS (non-intern) seat is reopening. Lead with the Claude Code agent-builds + Minima 0->1 seed->A story.
availability: posting loads; listed in Ashby board API (LIVE)
